name: @aperture-engine/workspace
description: WebGPU-only, ECS-native 3D runtime where simulation is authoritative and rendering is a derived view.

scripts.build: tsc -b packages/simulation packages/render packages/runtime packages/core packages/webgpu packages/vite-plugin packages/app
